description: Blueprint for extracting structured data from wind turbine maintenance logs - demonstrates the pattern applies to wind energy

Turbine_ID.instruction: Extract the turbine identifier or asset number from the report header

Wind_Farm.instruction: Extract the wind farm name from the header

Manufacturer.instruction: Extract the turbine manufacturer (e.g., Vestas, Siemens Gamesa, GE) from the equipment details

Model.instruction: Extract the turbine model number from the equipment details

Rated_Capacity_MW.instruction: Extract the rated capacity in megawatts from the turbine specifications

Commission_Date.instruction: Extract the turbine commissioning date from the asset information

Event_Date.instruction: Extract the date of the maintenance event from the log entry

Event_Type.instruction: Extract the type of maintenance (scheduled, unscheduled, corrective, predictive) from the log

Component.instruction: Extract the component serviced (gearbox, generator, blade, yaw system, pitch system, converter) from the work description

Downtime_Hours.instruction: Extract the total downtime in hours caused by this maintenance event

Description.instruction: Extract the work description or fault description from the maintenance log entry

Availability_Percent.instruction: Extract the turbine availability percentage for the reporting period

Capacity_Factor.instruction: Extract the capacity factor from the performance summary

Energy_Produced_MWh.instruction: Extract the total energy produced in MWh for the reporting period

Mean_Wind_Speed_ms.instruction: Extract the mean wind speed in meters per second for the reporting period

Turbine_Information.instruction: Extract all turbine identification and specification information from the report header

Maintenance_Events.instruction: Extract all maintenance events from the maintenance log table

Performance_Data.instruction: Extract performance metrics from the summary section
